rationale.R1.6: 'Clean this up' is a canonical writing-polish directive — sentence clarity, concision, flow, and paragraph cohesion are the load-bearing deliverable; failure to improve prose quality directly invalidates the delegation
rationale.R1.5: light narrative restructuring may accompany polishing (e.g., reordering a clause or merging sentences), but reorganizing sections is not requested and remains peripheral at 0.3
